channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Microsoft dévoile sept modèles d’IA maison pour s’émanciper d’OpenAI et partir chasser sur les terres d’Anthropic et de Google
item.description: À sa conférence Build, Microsoft a dévoilé sept modèles d'intelligence artificielle entièrement maison. Le message est clair : l'entreprise ne veut plus seulement louer l'IA d'OpenAI, elle veut la sienne. Et elle n'hésite plus à se comparer frontalement à Claude et à Google.

item.title: Trump signs executive order to review AI models before they’re released
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order Tuesday creating a "voluntary framework" for AI companies to share their frontier models with the federal government before they're released "to promote secure innovation and strengthen the cybersecurity of critical infrastructure." The order says the US AI industry has succeeded in part "because we refuse to stifle this […]...

item.title: A startup, Everand, is now bundling ebooks, audiobooks, and book clubs in challenge to Amazon
item.description: A new reading subscription from Everand offers access to both ebooks and audiobooks, and Fable's book club community.

item.title: Windows devient un système taillé pour les agents IA, voici comment
item.description: Faire tourner des agents IA qui agissent seuls sur votre PC, c'est génial sur le papier, et un peu effrayant en pratique. À sa conférence Build, Microsoft apporte une vraie réponse : enfermer ces agents dans des cages imposées par Windows lui-même.

item.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
item.description: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

item.title: Microsoft’s next-gen quantum chip cuts timeline to useful quantum computing
item.description: Microsoft claimed last year that it had made a key breakthrough in quantum computing with Majorana 1, the company's first quantum processor. While physicists were immediately skeptical of Microsoft's claims, the software giant is announcing Majorana 2 today, the next generation of its topological quantum chip. Majorana 2 contains qubits, a unit of information in […]...

item.title: Microsoft’s first advanced reasoning AI is here
item.description: Microsoft announced a bunch of new in-house AI models at Build 2026, including a new "flagship" model: MAI-Thinking-1. It's an ambitious step into model development for Microsoft, which introduced its initial in-house models last year - before then, it had relied on OpenAI's models. The two companies recently renegotiated their deal to loosen ties. According […]...

item.title: The durable, floatable UE Wonderboom 4 speaker is cheaper than ever
item.description: I like the UE Wonderboom 4 Bluetooth speaker so much that I bought two of them, though I wish I could have paid less for them. Fortunately, you can stock up on the cheap, so long as you like the color blue. The Wonderboom 4 is available in blue at Amazon for $51.49, and at […]

item.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
item.description: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

item.title: Project Solara : Microsoft mise sur des appareils qui font tourner l’IA, pas des applis
item.description: Microsoft a dévoilé, à sa conférence Build 2026, des appareils qui font tourner des agents IA au lieu d’applications. Ça commence avec un badge d’employé (oui oui) et un hub de bureau. Et si le prochain ordinateur n’était plus un ordinateur ?

item.title: Meet Microsoft Scout, Your AI Coworker That Never Logs Off
item.description: Microsoft’s OpenClaw-style agent appears in Teams, just like a human colleague, and automates your dull office tasks.

item.title: Android Is Fighting Phone Scams With a New Feature to Prove Who’s Calling
item.description: Available for Android 12 and later, the anti-scam feature is baked into Google Dialer, which sends a silent “confirmation signal” to ensure whoever’s calling you is who they appear to be.

item.title: Microsoft Scout is a new AI personal assistant built on OpenClaw
item.description: Much like Google, Microsoft is launching its own version of OpenClaw. Microsoft Scout is an always-on assistant that integrates into Microsoft 365 apps like Outlook, OneDrive, and Microsoft Teams, allowing businesses to assign a virtual assistant to employees to help with organizing calendars, expense reporting, email drafts, and much more. Unlike Copilot that lives inside […]...

item.title: Google’s Phone app will tell you if a scammer is impersonating one of your contacts
item.description: Google is launching a new feature for its Phone app that aims to protect you from AI impersonation scams. Now, when you receive a call from a scammer that appears to be coming from the same number as one of your contacts, Phone by Google will flag the call as suspicious so you can hang […]

item.title: Ex-Anduril engineer raises $42M to build the Amazon of composite parts
item.description: Layup Parts co-founder Zack Eakin has drawn on a motorsports background, and his experience working for Palmer Luckey and Elon Musk, to tackle making faster, cheaper, and better composites.

item.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
item.description: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figures, family members, or employers.

item.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
item.description: The specification lets developer, compliance and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

item.title: Android will now warn you if a caller is impersonating someone you know
item.description: Google Photos and Google Play Books are also getting new AI-powered updates.

item.title: Enterprise AI agents keep creating data silos. Microsoft's Build answer is Microsoft IQ and Rayfin.
item.description: Every new AI agent your team deploys starts from scratch: no memory of how the business works, where data lives, or what rules apply. And as agentic coding tools spin up applications faster than anyone can govern them, each one risks becoming another silo outside your data layer entirely. Microsoft is addressing both problems directly at Build 2026.According to VentureBeat's VB Pulse's Q1 2026 RAG Infrastructure Market Tracker, hybrid retrieval intent among 100-plus employee organizations tripled from 10.3% in January to 33.3% in March, a signal that enterprises have moved past expanding RAG c...

item.title: The European Parliament may be ditching Google as its default search engine
item.description: The EU's moves towards digital sovereignty might include its Parliament ditching Google.

item.title: The Camp Snap 2 screenless camera is 15 percent thinner than the original
item.description: The Camp Snap 2 is a slight improvement on the nostalgic throwback camera.

item.title: Hackers found a way to make Meta’s AI hand over Instagram accounts
item.description: The exploit affected hundreds of accounts and raises new questions about what happens when companies automate account security. The Instagram account of the Obama White House has not been active for more than nine years, but over the weekend, hackers gained access, defacing the page with pro-Iranian images and messages. And it was Meta AI that gave them the keys to do so....

item.title: I tested a bunch of Switch 2 screen protectors, and these are the best
item.description: A glass screen protector is one of a few essential accessories that I strongly recommend to every Switch 2 owner. In fact, it should be a priority to stick one onto the console’s screen as soon as possible to avoid accidental scratches. To test the candidates below, I installed and removed Switch 2 screen protectors […]

item.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
item.description: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

item.title: Microsoft announces Project Solara, its take on an AI agent platform
item.description: The company demoed Solara on an Echo Show-style smart display and a smart key badge.

item.title: Watercooling sans pompe ni bruit : où en est vraiment le pari fou de Noctua après deux ans de prototypes
item.description: Depuis 2024, Noctua promène au Computex un refroidisseur liquide sans pompe. Cette année, il tient enfin tête à un vrai AIO, et ça commence à devenir sérieux.

item.title: Microsoft’s Project Solara is an OS for AI agent gadgets
item.description: Microsoft just announced "Project Solara," a new OS designed for gadgets that run AI agents, at Build 2026. The company is calling it "a new platform built from the ground up to power agent-driven experiences." It's built on Android, not Windows. Microsoft demonstrated two concept Project Solara devices at Build today: Desk concept and badge […]

item.title: Intelligence artificielle | La nouvelle stratégie fédérale mettra l’accent sur la confiance
item.description: Le ministre responsable de l’Intelligence artificielle (IA), Evan Solomon, a affirmé que la nouvelle stratégie du gouvernement fédéral en matière d’IA viserait à renforcer la confiance dans cette technologie.

item.title: Philips TV OLED 77 pouces, PS5 Slim et Disney+ en promotion : les meilleurs bons plans du jour
item.description: Ce mardi 2 juin 2026, trois offres se démarquent sur le web.

item.title: Nvidia, SLB, Amazon, and Meta are the top companies adopting AI, but that doesn't mean they're seeing the benefits
item.description: The biggest AI investors are still struggling to deliver real ROI from artificial intelligence – smaller companies could struggle more.

item.title: Focused Energy raises whopping $240M Series A for laser-powered fusion tech
item.description: Another fusion startup has raised another a massive round to make this type of power a reality.

item.title: Cherry reveals 'first 8K Ultra-Wideband gaming keyboard' at Computex 2026 — and it has me intrigued as a controller fan
item.description: Gaming on a mouse and keyboard isn't for everyone, but this new Cherry Ultra-Wideband keyboard has me more interested than ever before.

item.title: Test du Motorola Razr Fold : j’ai testé le premier pliable « livre » de la marque, il cache bien son jeu
item.description: Premier pliable au format livre pour Motorola : le Razr Fold est-il un vrai rival du Galaxy Z Fold 7 ? Après dix jours de test, voici le verdict de Frandroid.

item.title: Balance 3 et Balance Ultra : on n’arrête plus Amazfit qui lance deux montres de sport au look élégant
item.description: Amazfit continue d'enchaîner les lancements de montres connectées avec deux nouveaux modèles au design élégant, les Amazfit Balance 3 et Amazfit Balance Ultra.

item.title: Microsoft dévoile un mini Surface sous puce Nvidia RTX Spark, pensé pour l’IA en local et capable de faire tourner des modèles à 120 milliards de paramètres
item.description: À l'ouverture de sa conférence Build, Microsoft dévoile un mini Surface pour développeurs, animé par la puce RTX Spark de Nvidia. Et au passage, il réussit le produit que Qualcomm n'avait jamais réussi à sortir.
